workshoptitle: Explore a Workflow Agent in AI Agent Studio RAP

tutorials.title: Introduction: Build an extension to a pre-defined AI Agent Studio workflow template
Lab 1: Examine the pre-built Purchase Requisition Chat Assistant template and components
Lab 2: Create a new custom agent to check supplier inventory via API call
Lab 3: Update the workflow with the new agent and test
Need Help?
